emotion_words = ["scared","afraid","fear","terrified","worried","anxious","exhausted","guilt","panic","overwhelmed","desperate","helpless"]
trigger_words = ["2am","3am","middle of the night","tonight","right now","urgent","appointment","pharmacy","started","switching","pregnant","postpartum","teething","hot flashes","night sweats","power outage","storm"]
detail_words = ["mg","drops","teaspoon","tablespoon","days","weeks","hours","months","years"]
neg_words = ["didn't work","doesn't work","no effect","made it worse","worse","avoid","danger","unsafe","contraindicated","scam","bs","bullshit"]
def quote_score(text):
    t = text.lower()
    s = 0
    if any(w in t for w in emotion_words): s += 2
    if any(w in t for w in trigger_words): s += 2
    if any(w in t for w in detail_words): s += 1.5
    if "?" in t: s += 0.5
    if re.search(r"\b(i|my|we|our)\b", t): s += 1
    if re.search(r"\b(only thing|nothing works|so tired|can't)\b", t): s += 1
    # penalize extremely short or generic
    if len(text) < 60: s -= 0.5
    if len(text) > 700: s -= 0.3
    return s

def get_top_quotes(dfsub, k=5):
    d = dfsub.copy()
    d['score'] = d['verbatim'].astype(str).apply(quote_score)
    d = d.sort_values(['score','len'], ascending=[False, True])
    top = d.head(k)
    quotes=[]
    for _,r in top.iterrows():
        voc_id="R"+r['evidence_id']
        q=str(r['verbatim'])
        if len(q)>320:
            q=q[:320]
        quotes.append({"voc_id":voc_id,"quote":q,"adjusted_score":float(round(r['score'],3))})
    return quotes, top

def contradiction_count(dfsub):
    t = dfsub['verbatim'].astype(str).str.lower()
    pattern = "|".join(re.escape(w) for w in neg_words)
    return int(t.str.contains(pattern, regex=True).sum())

def triangulation(dfsub):
    types = dfsub['hab_norm'].nunique()
    if types<=1: return "SINGLE"
    if types==2: return "DUAL"
    return "MULTI"

def velocity(dfsub):
    d = dfsub[dfsub['dt'].notna()].copy()
    if len(d)<5:
        return "STEADY"
    recent6 = (today - d['dt'] <= pd.Timedelta(days=183)).mean()
    recent12 = (today - d['dt'] <= pd.Timedelta(days=365)).mean()
    # if recent6 high -> accelerating; else if recent12 moderate -> steady; else decel
    if recent6 >= 0.35:
        return "ACCELERATING"
    if recent12 >= 0.35:
        return "STEADY"
    return "DECELERATING"

for k,v in clusters.items():
    print(k,len(v),triangulation(v),velocity(v),contradiction_count(v))

    print(k, [q['voc_id'] for q in quotes])
    print(quotes[0]['quote'][:200].replace("\n"," "))
    print("----")

marketing_terms = ["webinar","sold out","spaces left","comment","dm me","link in bio","use code","shop","sale","subscribe","follow","must have","call it","✨","#"]
def quote_score(text, source_type=None):
    t=text.lower()
    s=0
    if any(w in t for w in emotion_words): s+=2
    if any(w in t for w in trigger_words): s+=2
    if any(w in t for w in detail_words): s+=1.5
    if "?" in t: s+=0.7
    if re.search(r"\b(i|my|we|our)\b", t): s+=1
    if re.search(r"\b(help|advice|anyone|what do i|should i)\b", t): s+=1.2
    # source type bonus
    if source_type in ["REDDIT","FORUM","IG_COMMENT","YT_COMMENT"]:
        s+=1.0
    if source_type == "VIDEO_HOOK":
        s-=0.8
    # marketing penalty
    if any(mt in t for mt in marketing_terms):
        s-=1.2
    if len(text)<60: s-=0.5
    return s

def get_top_quotes(dfsub, k=5):
    d=dfsub.copy()
    d['score']=d.apply(lambda r: quote_score(str(r['verbatim']), r['source_type']), axis=1)
    d=d.sort_values(['score','len'], ascending=[False, True])
    top=d.head(k)
    quotes=[]
    for _,r in top.iterrows():
        voc_id="R"+r['evidence_id']
        q=str(r['verbatim'])
        if len(q)>320: q=q[:320]
        quotes.append({"voc_id":voc_id,"quote":q,"adjusted_score":float(round(r['score'],3))})
    return quotes, top

def quote_score(text, source_type=None):
    t=text.lower()
    s=0
    if any(w in t for w in emotion_words): s+=2
    if any(w in t for w in trigger_words): s+=2
    if any(w in t for w in detail_words): s+=1.5
    if "?" in t: s+=1.0
    if re.search(r"\b(i|my|we|our)\b", t): s+=1
    if re.search(r"\b(help|advice|anyone|what do i|should i|is it safe|safe)\b", t): s+=1.2
    # source type bonus
    if source_type in ["REDDIT","FORUM","IG_COMMENT","YT_COMMENT"]:
        s+=1.0
    if source_type == "VIDEO_HOOK":
        s-=1.2
    # marketing penalty
    if any(mt in t for mt in marketing_terms):
        s-=1.5
    if t.count("#")>=3:
        s-=1
    if len(text)>500:
        s-=1.0
    if len(text)<60:
        s-=0.5
    return s

def get_top_quotes(dfsub, k=5):
    d=dfsub.copy()
    d['score']=d.apply(lambda r: quote_score(str(r['verbatim']), r['source_type']), axis=1)
    d=d.sort_values(['score','len'], ascending=[False, True])
    selected=[]
    used_sha=set()
    used_hab=set()
    used_source=set()
    for _,r in d.iterrows():
        # dedupe by verbatim hash
        h=hash(r['verbatim'])
        if h in used_sha: 
            continue
        # diversify: avoid more than 2 same hab_norm if possible
        if len(selected)<k:
            # allow
            pass
        selected.append(r)
        used_sha.add(h)
        used_hab.add(r['hab_norm'])
        used_source.add(r['source_type'])
        if len(selected)>=k:
            break
    quotes=[]
    for r in selected:
        voc_id="R"+r['evidence_id']
        q=str(r['verbatim'])
        if len(q)>320: q=q[:320]
        quotes.append({"voc_id":voc_id,"quote":q,"adjusted_score":float(round(r['score'],3))})
    return quotes, pd.DataFrame(selected)

spam_patterns = [
r"\bASIN\b", r"buy.*\.com", r"\bLLC\b", r"verified .* marketplace", r"secure checkout", 
r"link in bio", r"use code", r"subscribe", r"follow me", r"DM me", r"join (our|my) facebook", 
r"spaces left", r"sold out", r"webinar", r"course", r"enroll", r"shop now", r"\bhttp", r"www\.", 
r"👉", r"✅", r"🛒", r"🔥 welcome", r"free apothe", r"practitioner only"
]
spam_re = re.compile("|".join(spam_patterns), re.IGNORECASE)
def is_spam(text):
    if not isinstance(text,str): return False
    if spam_re.search(text):
        return True
    # many hashtags
    if text.count("#")>=6:
        return True
    return False

r"link in bio", r"use code", r"\bpromo\b", r"affiliate", r"shop now", r"sold out", r"webinar", r"enroll", r"course"
]
spam_re_light = re.compile("|".join(spam_patterns_light), re.IGNORECASE)
def is_spam_light(text):
    if not isinstance(text,str): return False
    if spam_re_light.search(text):
        return True
    if text.count("#")>=10:
        return True
    return False

a01[a01['verbatim'].str.contains(r"\bI('| a)m on\b|\bmy meds\b|\bmy medication\b", case=False, na=False, regex=True)][['evidence_id','source_type','verbatim']].head(10).to_dict('records')

mask = df_light['verbatim'].str.contains(r"on (a )?(prescription|medication|blood thinner|antidepressant|ssri|warfarin|eliquis|xarelto)", case=False, na=False, regex=True) & \
       df_light['verbatim'].str.contains(r"herb|supplement|tea|tincture", case=False, na=False, regex=True)
tmp=df_light[mask]
len(tmp), tmp['source_type'].value_counts().to_dict()

mask = df_light['verbatim'].str.contains(r"can i take|safe to take|okay to take|interaction|contraindicat", case=False, na=False, regex=True) & \
       df_light['verbatim'].str.contains(r"medication|prescription|blood thinner|antidepressant|ssri|statin|blood pressure|diabetes|warfarin|eliquis|xarelto", case=False, na=False, regex=True)
cand = df_light[mask]
len(cand), cand['source_type'].value_counts().to_dict()

mask = df_light['verbatim'].str.contains(r"can i take|safe to take|okay to take|interaction|contraindicat|mix|combine", case=False, na=False, regex=True) & \
       df_light['verbatim'].str.contains(r"medication|prescription|blood thinner|antidepressant|ssri|statin|blood pressure|diabetes|warfarin|eliquis|xarelto", case=False, na=False, regex=True) & \
       df_light['verbatim'].str.contains(r"herb|herbal|supplement|tea|tincture|st\. john|ginkgo|garlic|ashwagandha", case=False, na=False, regex=True)
a01 = df_light[mask].copy()
len(a01), a01['source_type'].value_counts().to_dict()

pattern_a05 = r"(herb|herbal|remed|supplement|natural).*(woo|snake oil|mlm|doterra|young living|influencer|tiktok|counterfeit|fake|misinformation|ai).*(trust|evidence|science|research|skeptic|bs|bullshit|confus|mixed|contradict)" \
             r"|(trust|evidence|science|research|skeptic|confus|mixed).*(herb|herbal|remed|supplement|natural).*(woo|mlm|tiktok|counterfeit|fake|misinformation|ai)" \
             r"|google.*(herb|herbal|remed|supplement|natural).*(mixed|confus|contradict|can't trust)"
clusters['A05'] = sel_light(pattern_a05)
len(clusters['A05']), clusters['A05']['source_type'].value_counts().to_dict()

clusters['A09'] = sel_light(r"\b(preparedness|emergency|power outage|hurricane|storm|grid|bug out|wilderness|first aid|first responder|wfr|stop the bleed|survival)\b.*\b(herb|herbal|apothecary|remed|yarrow|plantain|neem|comfrey|arnica)\b|\b(herbal)\b.*\b(first aid|wilderness|emergency|preparedness)\b")
len(clusters['A09']), clusters['A09']['source_type'].value_counts().to_dict()

angle_specs = [
("POA01","Interaction-Safe Add‑Ons","A01",
 {"who":"Adults on prescriptions/HRT adding herbs or supplements but fear interactions ({ids})",
  "trigger":"New Rx/HRT + want to keep/start herbs; ask “is this safe together?” ({ids2})",
  "pain":"Conflicting advice + unregulated bottles; fear making symptoms/anxiety worse; wants a clear avoid/caution/OK list + timing + when to ask clinician. Failed: guessing, Googling. ({ids3})",
  "belief_before":"OTC/natural means it’s safe to combine. ({ids})",
  "belief_after":"Natural still needs interaction guardrails + a go/no‑go check. ({ids2})",
  "mech":"Handbook cross-checks meds↔herbs with contraindication flags, timing tips, and “when to seek care” prompts; customizable to your med list."
 }),
("POA02","2am Kid Remedy Triage","A02",
 {"who":"Exhausted parents of teething/sick babies trying to stay “natural” without harming their kid ({ids})",
  "trigger":"3am pain/fever + guilt about Tylenol/Nurofen + “what else can I try tonight?” ({ids2})",
  "pain":"Tried drops/gels/frozen tricks—nothing lasts; fear unsafe teething products + fear meds. Outcome: safe comfort steps + when OTC is reasonable + red flags. Enemy: internet guilt wars. ({ids3})",
  "belief_before":"If it’s ‘natural’ it must be safer for babies. ({ids})",
  "belief_after":"Baby-safe = specific guardrails + escalation cues, not vibes. ({ids2})",
  "mech":"Symptom-first kid pages: age/weight notes, comfort options, what to avoid, when to use OTC, and “call/seek care” cutoffs—fast lookup."
 }),
("POA03","Pregnancy Tea Panic Filter","A03",
 {"who":"Pregnant/nursing people who want natural relief but worry every herb/tea is risky ({ids})",
  "trigger":"Realize a favorite tea/herb may be unsafe; panic + confusion from mixed lists ({ids2})",
  "pain":"“Most herbal teas aren’t considered safe” + conflicting sources; wants trimester/breastfeeding-safe lists + clear ‘avoid’ reasons + when to ask provider. Failed: Google roulette. ({ids3})",
  "belief_before":"If it’s sold as tea, it’s automatically pregnancy-safe. ({ids})",
  "belief_after":"Pregnancy-safe depends on herb + dose + stage; use a vetted list. ({ids2})",
  "mech":"Pregnancy/breastfeeding filter + evidence-graded entries, common ingredients cross-check, and conservative ‘stop/ask’ flags."
 }),
("POA04","Menopause/HRT Supplement Cross‑Check","A04",
 {"who":"Peri/menopause buyers starting HRT or symptom stacks who still want botanicals—but safely ({ids})",
  "trigger":"Start HRT + can’t get clear answers on supplements/herbs; doesn’t want to “mess it up” ({ids2})",
  "pain":"Doctor can’t confirm safety; overwhelmed by hot-flash/sleep/mood stacks. Outcome: what to pause, what’s low-risk, what to monitor, and when to escalate. ({ids3})",
  "belief_before":"I can just keep all my usual supplements when I start HRT. ({ids})",
  "belief_after":"HRT + herbs = plan + monitoring + interaction screen. ({ids2})",
  "mech":"HRT-aware checklists: interaction red/yellow/green, symptom-support options, and a “questions to bring to clinician” page."
 }),
("POA05","Stop Buying ‘Bottles of Hope’","A05",
 {"who":"Natural-curious shoppers burned by influencer trends & sketchy supplement claims ({ids})",
  "trigger":"Standing in the ‘detox/energy’ aisle or doomscrolling—realizing you’re overspending + still unsure what’s real ({ids2})",
  "pain":"Can’t trust labels/AI-ish books; hates woo but wants options. Outcome: a simple evidence-graded shortlist + how to vet quality. Failed: impulse buys. Enemy: hype economy. ({ids3})",
  "belief_before":"More supplements = more progress. ({ids})",
  "belief_after":"Fewer, higher-confidence basics + clear ‘not worth it’ calls. ({ids2})",
  "mech":"Evidence-graded remedy entries + “quality / third-party test / red-flag claims” checklists; customizable ‘keep/skip’ list."
 }),
("POA06","Home Apothecary (No Clutter)","A06",
 {"who":"DIY wellness learners building a home apothecary/medicine cabinet but overwhelmed by what to stock ({ids})",
  "trigger":"New home/baby/season change + “what do I actually need on hand?” ({ids2})",
  "pain":"Random purchases turn into cabinet graveyard; wants a minimal kit with multipurpose items, storage/shelf-life notes, and quick lookup for common issues. ({ids3})",
  "belief_before":"I need a separate product for every symptom. ({ids})",
  "belief_after":"A small, multipurpose kit + a lookup system beats chaos. ({ids2})",
  "mech":"Customizable apothecary builder: shopping list, prep methods (tea/tincture/salve), labeling, rotation dates, and safety flags."
 }),
("POA07","Sensitive-Reactor Guardrails","A07",
 {"who":"People who get side effects or allergic reactions from ‘normal’ herbs/supplements ({ids})",
  "trigger":"A bad reaction (itch/hives/flare) makes them afraid to try anything again ({ids2})",
  "pain":"Wants natural support but can’t risk another reaction; needs ‘start low’ steps, what to avoid, and when symptoms mean stop/seek care. Failed: self-experimenting. ({ids3})",
  "belief_before":"If it’s a common herb, it can’t cause a real reaction. ({ids})",
  "belief_after":"Sensitivity is real—dose/form + contraindications matter. ({ids2})",
  "mech":"Sensitivity flags per entry + conservative titration guidance + cross-reactivity notes + clear stop-signs; customizable by known sensitivities."
 }),
("POA08","Dose & Form Decoder","A08",
 {"who":"People with tinctures/teas/capsules asking ‘how much, how often, how long?’ ({ids})",
  "trigger":"Bought a tincture or tea blend but labels + online advice are vague/contradictory ({ids2})",
  "pain":"Fear of taking too much or wasting time with too little; wants form-based dosing ranges, timing, and “if no change by X, stop” rules. Failed: guessing. ({ids3})",
  "belief_before":"Directions online are universal for everyone. ({ids})",
  "belief_after":"Dose depends on form + goal + your context—use a table, not comments. ({ids2})",
  "mech":"Form-first dosage tables (tea vs tincture vs capsule), timing windows, and personalization notes; plus ‘when to pause’ cautions."
 }),
("POA09","Herbal First-Aid (Realistic)","A09",
 {"who":"Hikers/campers/parents who want herbal first-aid options in their kit—not doomsday prepping ({ids})",
  "trigger":"Trip/storm season + realizing you might be far from care; want confidence for common cuts/bumps ({ids2})",
  "pain":"Not sure what belongs in an herbal kit or what’s unsafe; wants a small ‘field-tested’ list + clear limits on when to seek medical help. ({ids3})",
  "belief_before":"An herbal kit should replace modern first aid. ({ids})",
  "belief_after":"Herbal + modern together, with clear escalation rules. ({ids2})",
  "mech":"First-aid module: kit checklist, quick recipes, storage, and ‘do not use / get stitches / urgent care’ thresholds; customizable by trip type."
 }),
("POA10","Skin & Gut ‘Small Fixes’","A10",
 {"who":"People dealing with recurring rashes/eczema/acne or nausea/GERD who want gentler options ({ids})",
  "trigger":"Flare-up hits + they don’t want a 12-supplement protocol or harsh meds ({ids2})",
  "pain":"Trial-and-error products waste money; wants simple first steps (topical/tea), patch-test notes, and ‘stop/seek care’ red flags. Enemy: ‘stack culture’. ({ids3})",
  "belief_before":"Natural care means a long, complicated protocol. ({ids})",
  "belief_after":"Start with the simplest safe option + clear stop rules. ({ids2})",
  "mech":"Symptom quick pages: simplest topical/tea options, contraindication flags, and step-up ladder; customizable by sensitivity and meds."
 })
]
# format with ids
def fmt(s, ids, ids2, ids3):
    return s.format(ids=",".join(ids[:2]), ids2=",".join(ids2[:2]), ids3=",".join(ids3[:2]))

# Build and check lengths
for aid,name,ck,txt in angle_specs:
    idlist=[q['voc_id'] for q in top_quotes_map[ck]]
    who=fmt(txt['who'],idlist,idlist[1:],idlist[2:])
    trig=fmt(txt['trigger'],idlist,idlist[1:],idlist[2:])
    pain=fmt(txt['pain'],idlist,idlist[1:],idlist[2:])
    mech=txt['mech']
    bb=fmt(txt['belief_before'],idlist,idlist[1:],idlist[2:])
    ba=fmt(txt['belief_after'],idlist,idlist[1:],idlist[2:])
    maxlen=max(len(who),len(trig),len(pain),len(mech),len(bb),len(ba))
    print(aid,maxlen)

for aid,name,ck,txt in angle_specs:
    print(aid, len(txt['mech']))
